tags.name: `mc-progress-indicator`
tags.description:
Purpose: Indicate that a process is ongoing or loading and show the progress of that process.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to show that something is loading or processing.
When not to use: When you need to show static content or completed states.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-drawer, mc-input, mc-modal, mc-tab
Alternative component names: Spinner, Loader, Progress Indicator, Progress Bar, Completion Indicator, Task Progress

Attributes:

  * `value` {number} - The current value of the progress indicator.

  * `max` {number} - The maximum value of the progress indicator.

Properties:

  * `progressBarElement` {`HTMLElement`} - 

  * `progressElement` {`HTMLElement`} - 

  * `ringDash` {`number`} - 

  * `ringStrokeDasharray` {`string`} - 

  * `ringStrokeDashoffset` {`string`} - 

  * `ringTransform` {`string`} - 

  * `value` {number} - The current value of the progress indicator.

  * `max` {number} - The maximum value of the progress indicator.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
`value` {number} - The current value of the progress indicator.

Property: value

Default: 0

attributes.name: max
attributes.description:
`max` {number} - The maximum value of the progress indicator.

Property: max

Default: 100
